# Sprint 5.1 Retention Lever Identification

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 5. Retention Strategy
**Objective:** Develop a retention strategy based on the predictions from the models, including financial incentives, experience improvements, product interventions, and relationship interventions.

## Description
Identify the retention levers, including financial incentives, experience improvements, product interventions, and relationship interventions.

## Deliverable
List of retention levers
